title: AI-powered Virtual Tour Guide
scenario: Develop a prompt that will generate a high-quality, informative, and engaging persona-based chatbot dialogue for a virtual tour guide. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates historical knowledge, cultural insights, and audience interaction. The guide should be able to provide information about the location, answer user queries, and provide personalized recommendations based on user interests. The dialogue should be 5-7 lines long, use a warm and engaging tone, and include a clear call-to-action for users to ask questions.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 user queries and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue warm, engaging, and informative?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and entertaining?
Does the dialogue incorporate personalized recommendations based on user interests?
